node.statement: STEP: For purities with noise IN the circuit: E_U Tr(ρ_B^2) has noise appearing in BOTH replicas (circled ⊕ signs). The bulk s-contribution is F̃^2 (square of fidelity's s-contribution). With boundary corrections from noise: E_U Tr(ρ_B^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1)N} + d^{-(f_2+r(1+g_{s,e}))N}. Similarly for ρ_{RB}. [Eq.(20), main.tex line 275-276]
